{{ block title }} Parts Two, Three and Four {{ endblock }} {{ block content }}

That concludes Part One.

  • In Parts Two, Three, and Four we will offer you addition opportunities for payment (further payments of $8 to $40).
  • The computer will randomly select five different participants in this room
    • One participant will be selected for payment in Part Two
    • One participant will be selected for payment in Part Three
    • Three participants will be selected for payment in Part Four

We will give you instructions for your decisions in each Part in turn.

{{ if test == 1 }} (Next button for testing purposes.)
